1752380.name: 逐光之旅 Lumione Soundtrack
1752380.description:
The Lumione Game Soundtrack has officially been released! The soundtrack album includes 32 pieces of original background music used in the game. Our carefully crafted songs will allow players to embark on their very own deep-sea adventure no matter where they may be.

The Lumione soundtrack takes you on a journey deep into the sea, with the bubbles rising and the seawater flowing. The background music was built around the plot of the game. You will encounter a variety of moods as you progress through the game’s “levels”, from soothing to intense, from cheerful to somber. This soundtrack album is an experience in itself.

Come join our little Glimmer and have a listen for yourself. Who knows where you may find yourself as you pursue your own journey in search of the light.
